languages.text: "Благословенны те, кто прислушивается к зову Омниссии! Буду ожидать вас в Секторе Бионика, Вольный Торговец".
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Благословенны те, кто прислушивается к зову Омниссии! Буду ожидать вас в Секторе Бионика, Вольный Торговец".

traits.locale_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: « Bénis soient ceux qui répondent à l'appel de l'Omnimessie ! Je vous attendrai dans le secteur Bionica, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Bénis soient ceux qui répondent à l'appel de l'Omnimessie ! Je vous attendrai dans le secteur Bionica, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: «¡Benditos los que acuden a la llamada del Omnissiah! Le esperaré en el Sector Bionica, Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «¡Benditos los que acuden a la llamada del Omnissiah! Le esperaré en el Sector Bionica, Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: “凡聆听欧姆尼赛亚之召唤者，皆为蒙福之人！我会在仿生区等您，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “凡聆听欧姆尼赛亚之召唤者，皆为蒙福之人！我会在仿生区等您，行商浪人。”

languages.text: "Gesegnet sind jene, die dem Ruf des Omnissiah folgen! Ich werde im Sektor Bionica auf Euch warten, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Gesegnet sind jene, die dem Ruf des Omnissiah folgen! Ich werde im Sektor Bionica auf Euch warten, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: "Hermesih'in çağrısına kulak verenler ne kutsaldır! Sektör Biyonika'da bekliyor olacağım Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in çağrısına kulak verenler ne kutsaldır! Sektör Biyonika'da bekliyor olacağım Hür Tacir."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカで待っています、キャプテン様」
languages.original_text: "I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain."
